2605.09431.title: PumpSense: Real-Time Detection and Target Extraction of Crypto Pump-and-Dumps on Telegram
2605.09431.paper_summary: Cryptocurrency pump-and-dump schemes coordinated via Telegram threaten market integrity. However, existing research addressing this specific threat has not yet produced solutions that combine reliable results with fast response. This is in part due to the absence of publicly available, message-level labeled data, as well as design choices. In this paper, we address both issues. In particular, we introduce a corpus of over 280,000 Telegram posts from 39 pump-organizing groups, all manually reviewed to identify 2,246 pump announcements and their targeted cryptocurrency and exchange. Leveraging this dataset, we define two tasks: real-time pump-announcement detection and target cryptocurrency/exchange extraction. For detection, we compare two machine-learning models: a lightweight tree-based LightGBM classifier (F1=0.79, latency=9.4 s/sample) and a transformer-based BGE-M3 (F1=0.83, latency=50 ms/sample). With our proposed approach, we show that message analysis can achieve near-instant pump detection at the level of individual Telegram message windows. Unlike prior work that relies purely on market data and typically detects pumps tens of seconds after abnormal trading activity is observed, our method operates directly on the coordination messages themselves and can be evaluated in microseconds per window on commodity hardware. To our knowledge, we also establish the first benchmark for manipulated coin and exchange extraction. We demonstrate that traditional rule-based extraction methods, widely relied upon in prior literature, are ineffective due to ticker ambiguity. In contrast, LLMs achieve the highest accuracy with a score of 0.91.
2605.09431.paper_summary_zh: 加密貨幣的拉抬和拋售計畫透過 Telegram 協調，威脅著市場的完整性。<lb/>然而，現有針對這一特定威脅的研究尚未產生結合可靠結果與快速反應的解決方案。<lb/>這在某種程度上是由於缺乏公開可用的、消息層級標記數據，以及設計選擇。<lb/>在本文中，我們解決了這兩個問題。<lb/>特別是，我們介紹了一個包含來自 39 個拉抬組織的超過 280,000 條 Telegram 貼文的語料庫，所有貼文都經過人工審查，以識別 2,246 條拉抬公告及其目標加密貨幣和交易所。<lb/>利用這個數據集，我們定義了兩個任務：實時拉抬公告檢測和目標加密貨幣/交易所提取。<lb/>在檢測方面，我們比較了兩種機器學習模型：一種輕量級基於樹的 LightGBM 分類器（F1=0.79，延遲=9.4 秒/樣本）和一種基於Transformer的 BGE-M3（F1=0.83，延遲=50 毫秒/樣本）。<lb/>通過我們提出的方法，我們顯示消息分析可以在單個 Telegram 消息窗口的層級實現近乎即時的拉抬檢測。<lb/>與之前僅依賴市場數據並通常在觀察到異常交易活動後幾十秒才檢測到拉抬的工作不同，我們的方法直接作用於協調消息本身，並且可以在商業硬體上以微秒為單位進行評估。<lb/>據我們所知，我們還建立了操縱幣和交易所提取的第一個基準。<lb/>我們證明了傳統的基於規則的提取方法，在之前的文獻中被廣泛依賴，由於代碼模糊性而無效。<lb/>相比之下，LLMs 以 0.91 的分數達到最高準確率。
2605.09431.author: Ahmed Mahrous et.al.
